# monolithic-blob

Monolithic resource.customizations YAML blob uses applyOverrideMap

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/resource-customizations/monolithic-blob` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  resource.customizations: |
    apps/Deployment:
      health.lua: |
        return {status="Healthy"}
      ignoreDifferences:
        jsonPointers:
          - /spec/replicas
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  controller:
    resource:
      health:
      - group: apps
        healthLua: |
          return {status="Healthy"}
        kind: Deployment
      ignoreDifferences:
      - group: apps
        jsonPointers:
        - /spec/replicas
        kind: Deployment
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  resource.customizations.health.apps_Deployment: |
    return {status="Healthy"}
  resource.customizations.ignoreDifferences.apps_Deployment: |
    jsonPointers:
    - /spec/replicas
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-rbac-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
```
